title: Public-data multiscale immune decoupling analysis in sepsis
description: Journal-neutral code, derived supplementary tables, final figure source files, and reproducibility metadata for a public-data computational analysis of multiscale immune-state decoupling in sepsis. Version v0.1.3 synchronizes the public reproducibility record with the final June 22 language and figure revision, updated Figure 1 source files, final QA manifests, and revised package checksums.
